C1.descriptionTemplate: Castor obtains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Castor's DMG always critically hits; after playing {Onyx Plume}, inflict [Arg2] stacks of {Corrosion} on the target. Gain +50% Shield from keeping {Onyx Plume} cards in hand at turn ends.

C2.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG. Castor obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus. {Quasar}: Shuffle 1 {Onyx Plume} into the Draw Pile and gain [Block:Arg3] Shield.

C3.descriptionTemplate: Gain [Block:Arg1] Shield. Castor obtains [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus.{Quasar}: Shuffle 1 {Onyx Plume} into the Draw Pile, gain [Block:Arg3] Shield.

C4.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG [Arg2] times, increase other allies' Temporary Crit. DMG by [Arg5]% of Castor's Crit. DMG. {Quasar}: Shuffle 1 {Onyx Plume} into the Draw Pile and gain [Block:Arg4] Shield.

C5.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Block:Arg1] Shield, inflict {Weakness} on all enemies for 1 turn. {Quasar}: Shuffle 1 {Onyx Plume} into the Draw Pile, obtain [Block:Arg3] Shield.

Exalt.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Block:Arg1] Shield and shuffle [Arg2] {Onyx Plume} into the Draw Pile.

OverExalt.descriptionTemplate: Add 3 additional {Onyx Plume} to your hand. This turn, increase the amount of Shield {Retained} by {Onyx Plume} by 10% of Castor's DEF, and each time you play an {Onyx Plume} card, additionally inflict Castor's ATK*140% stacks of {Corrosion}.

promotedExtras.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg2] DMG and draw [Arg1] cards. {Retain}: Obtain [Block:Arg3] Shield. {Exhaust}.

T1.descriptionTemplate:
Playing {Onyx Plume} for the first time each turn inflicts 840% of Castor's ATK as {Corrosion} on the target and grants 10 Aliemus.
For every 1% DMG Amplification that Castor has, the Base amount of {Corrosion} inflicted increases by 1%.
After the battle, {Corrosion} inflicted by Castor permanently increases by 20% during this Exploration.
{Corrosion} inflicted in Boss Battles doubles.
After inflicting {Corrosion}, Castor's DMG output increases by 5% of the amount of {Corrosion} inflicted this turn.
DMG dealt by Castor does not remove {Corrosion}.

T2.descriptionTemplate: Obtain [Arg1] Aliemus after the start of exploration.

T3.descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF are increased by [Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
Playing {Onyx Plume} will not add {Arithmetica Harmony}. {Corrosion} inflicted with {Cleansing Feathers} is increased by [Arg3]% of Castor's ATK. {Corrosion} inflicted to enemies of the "Church of the Lightbearers" + [Arg4]%.

E1.descriptionTemplate: At the start of the battle, place 1 {Onyx Plume} into hand.

E2.descriptionTemplate: For every {Onyx Plume} in hand, playing {Stygian Wings} grants 5 Aliemus. For every {Onyx Plume} you play, the Arithmetica Cost of {Umbral Flight} is reduced by 1 this turn.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg1] DMG [Arg2] times, increase other allies' Temporary Crit. DMG by [Arg5]% of Castor's Crit. DMG. For every {Onyx Plume} played this turn, Arithmetica Cost -1. {Quasar}: Shuffle 1 {Onyx Plume} into the Draw Pile and gain [Block:Arg4] Shield.

Obtain [Block:Arg1] Shield, inflict {Weakness} on all enemies for 1 turn. For every {Onyx Plume} in hand, obtain [Energy:Arg2] Aliemus. {Quasar}: Shuffle 1 {Onyx Plume} into the Draw Pile, obtain [Block:Arg3] Shield.

E3.descriptionTemplate: For every 3 {Onyx Plume} you play, obtain 1 Arithmetica and increase Castor's Final DMG by 10% in this battle.

upgradePatches.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg2] DMG and draw [Arg1] cards. For every 3 {Onyx Plume} played, obtain 1 Arithmetica and increase Castor's Final DMG by 10% in this battle. {Retain}: Obtain [Block:Arg3] Shield. {Exhaust}.

derivedSkills.descriptionTemplate: Deal [Damage:Arg2] DMG and draw [Arg1] cards. {Retain}: Obtain [Block:Arg3] Shield. {Exhaust}.
